[2023-05-28 01:34] Deliverables for coaching a leader include customized coaching plan, progress reports, feedback reports, coaching sessions, skill-building resources, accountability check-ins, and team feedback reports
nodes.description: Deliverables for coaching a leader who is not holding his team accountable and lacks confidence in their capabilities include: 1. Coaching plan: A customized coaching plan that outlines specific goals and objectives, areas for improvement, and action items for the leader to work on. 2. Progress reports: Regular progress reports that track the leader's progress towards his goals and objectives, as well as any challenges or obstacles encountered. 3. Feedback reports: Reports that summarize feedback from the 360-degree assessment and other sources, highlighting strengths and areas for improvement. 4. Coaching sessions: Regular coaching sessions with the leader to provide feedback, guidance, and support in achieving his goals and addressing areas for improvement. 5. Skill-building resources: Access to skill-building resources, such as books, workshops, and online training programs, to help the leader develop specific leadership skills. 6. Accountability check-ins: Regular check-ins to hold the leader accountable for following through on action items and commitments made during coaching sessions. 7. Team feedback reports: Reports that summarize feedback from the leader's team, highlighting areas where the leader can improve his leadership style and build trust with his team.

nodes.title: [2023-05-28 01:34] Using a pledge or commitment statement can create an environment of accountability within the team
nodes.description: Using a pledge or commitment statement for the leader to complete can be an effective way to create an environment of accountability within the team. Suggestions include: 1. Collaborative process: Involve the leader and the team in the process of creating the pledge or commitment statement. 2. Clear expectations: Clearly articulate the expectations for the leader and the team in the pledge or commitment statement. 3. Measurable goals: Include measurable goals in the pledge or commitment statement to help track progress and hold the leader and the team accountable. 4. Regular review: Schedule regular reviews of the pledge or commitment statement with the team to assess progress, identify areas for improvement, and make adjustments as needed. 5. Shared accountability: Make the pledge or commitment statement a shared document that the leader and the team can refer to regularly. 6. Public commitment: Ask the leader to share the pledge or commitment statement with the team and make a public commitment to uphold it.

nodes.title: [2023-05-28 01:34] Using 'stop doing, do more of, do less of, keep doing' can help coach an underperforming team

nodes.description: Recommendations to clone the capabilities of a team leader include: 1. Role modeling: The leader demonstrates desired behaviors. 2. nodes.title: [2023-05-28 01:34] Creative methods to engage a team in cloning their leader's capabilities include role-playing, shadowing, peer mentoring, gamification, leadership book club, and simulation exercises

nodes.title: [2023-05-28 09:36] Water scarcity can cause migration from rural communities
nodes.description: In search of better livelihoods, rural communities may be forced to migrate to urban areas, leading to social and economic dislocation.
